name: Lime Bars
recipeInstructions:
Combine 2 cups flour and 1/2 cup powdered sugar. Cut butter into the flour mixture with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal. Spoon the flour mixture into an ungreased 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan; press firmly and evenly into the pan using fingertips. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until the crust is lightly browned. Combine remaining 1/2 cup flour and baking powder; set aside. Combine eggs, 2 cups sugar, lime rind (if desired), and lime juice; stir well. Stir dry ingredients into egg mixture, and pour over baked crust. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until lightly browned and set. Cool on a wire rack. Dust lightly with powdered sugar, and cut into bars.
Yield: about 2 dozen.
